60683e4d32a7e03dba8cc81a4cdb0a6a7f4ab892.note: `fieldAngle` function is undefined, the demo does not work

ab355c3941e4d1f61c0ea3b9114b8724f209728b.note: I don't like how the log stream window initially starts at a smaller size then grows to the max. The pipeline topology is really slick and has a clean animation.

The "scroll" text is positioned poorly, there are no images for the previous work cards. I do like the subtle hover effect for the sidebar "trusted by" portion, and the bold orange italic text is a nice touch.

f7394698e30d7952d0cca66eca14407671c6f9b8.note:
All kinds of console failures, plus it doesn't work:
```
PMREMGenerator.js:1  Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 ()
about:srcdoc:151 Mic denied, using synthetic fallback SecurityError: Invalid security origin
about:srcdoc:1 Uncaught (in promise) InvalidStateError: Failed to set the 'buffer' property on 'AudioBufferSourceNode': Cannot set buffer to non-null after it has been already been set to a non-null buffer
```
No render, failed network request to `PMREMGenerator.js` likely at fault; might rely on missing deps due to failing to verify

5de58806437e06019790e41dcf6215566ffda660.note: The top of the graphs are cut off, could've used better sizing. The dashboard top row also doesn't resize well so it goes off the screen in the preview. The buttons are all interactive but don't attempt to perform any kind of action on the page.

60683e4d32a7e03dba8cc81a4cdb0a6a7f4ab892.note: Solid attempt, chose the upcoming Tuesday in the current week vs. the upcoming week's Tuesday

ab355c3941e4d1f61c0ea3b9114b8724f209728b.note: The black above/beneath the chart curves is very ugly. The interactive nature of the 24h window is pretty sick.

862eba626606f7e63f1c7fef1a2e9250b61644ce.note: Really cool streaming in of the log data., although the fading isn't at the bottom. Neat subtle highlight effect on the "Why teams switch" cards. The "trusted by" section is too dark. Smooth chart animation for the pipeline, but the concept being demonstrated is not communicated clearly. Really sleek footer.

ab355c3941e4d1f61c0ea3b9114b8724f209728b.note: The category dropdown rows lacking a background for each column is a bad look
The first model I've seen that gets the snip effect right!
Beautiful, I love how the gems catch the light as they rotate

60683e4d32a7e03dba8cc81a4cdb0a6a7f4ab892.note: The Google Play logo is messed up, but the rest of it looks solid for a local model

862eba626606f7e63f1c7fef1a2e9250b61644ce.note: The animation for the text does not line up with where it's expected. The SVGs do look pretty cool.

5de58806437e06019790e41dcf6215566ffda660.note: Scrolling feels a little janky and the pricing glow doesn't properly feather out at the rectangle border. The "Book Demo" text doesn't have good contrast. The scrolling logs are awesome.

f7394698e30d7952d0cca66eca14407671c6f9b8.note: Logs do not stream in, the initial animation just sends them away. The bullets in the footer are very "009 W3"

60683e4d32a7e03dba8cc81a4cdb0a6a7f4ab892.note: Solid grab logic, although it has black hole-like gravity that sucks in the bottom of the curtain as well
The g is cut off by line height, the animation sequence puts the words in an unexpected location.

862eba626606f7e63f1c7fef1a2e9250b61644ce.note: Very nice initial graphs, contained within the bounds of their containers. No data shows on the P99 latency window. Nice functionality of the service help table. The sidebar animation is very smooth.

f7394698e30d7952d0cca66eca14407671c6f9b8.note: The graphic doesn't make any sense, this page looks like rendered markdown

862eba626606f7e63f1c7fef1a2e9250b61644ce.note: I don't like how the "Your Week" emojis are selectable text. The year says 2024 for some reason.

a157958e9af76c81.text: Very dissatisfied with the model's overall performance, lags significantly behind competitor models like Qwen3.6-27B for coding-related tasks.
